task_completion.description: Verify that the 6 active tags for wellsite W-201 are created in Crimson 3.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Crimson 3.0 Navigation Pane (left side) under 'Data Tags', the tags FT_201, PT_201, TT_201, DP_201, AT_201, and FQ_201 should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the inactive tags for wellsite W-202 are NOT created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Crimson 3.0 Navigation Pane under 'Data Tags', the tags FT_202 and PT_202 must NOT be present.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tags are configured with the correct Data Type and Description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When a tag is selected, the main editing pane should show it as a Numeric Tag (Float) and the 'Description' field should match the expected text (e.g., 'Gas Flow Rate - AGA-3 Orifice Meter' for FT_201).

task_completion.description: Verify that the tags have the correct engineering range, units, and label configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data or Format tab for a selected tag, the Data limits (Min/Max), Units (e.g., MMscfd), and Label (e.g., 'Million Std Cubic Feet per Day') should match the specified values.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tags have the correct alarm thresholds configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Alarms tab for a selected tag, the alarm thresholds (Value) for Low and High alarms should match the specified values (e.g., Low 0.5 and High 8.5 for FT_201).

task_completion.description: Verify that the project is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Crimson 3.0 window title bar should display 'oilgas_flow' or 'oilgas_flow.c3', or a Save As dialog should show the file being saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\oilgas_flow.c3'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Crimson 3.0 GUI to configure the tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Crimson 3.0 application interface being actively used, rather than a script or terminal command.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use a text editor to manually create or edit the .c3 project file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the .c3 file being opened or edited in Notepad, VS Code, or any other text editor.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the tag properties tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through tabs (Data, Format, Alarms) and entering values in the GUI fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Active tags to configure: FT_201, PT_201, TT_201, DP_201, AT_201, FQ_201. Inactive tags to EXCLUDE: FT_202, PT_202. Properties:
FT_201: Float, 0-10 MMscfd, Label: 'Million Std Cubic Feet per Day', Desc: 'Gas Flow Rate - AGA-3 Orifice Meter', Alarms: 0.5(L), 8.5(H).
PT_201: Float, 0-1500 psia, Label: 'Pounds per Sq Inch Absolute', Desc: 'Upstream Static Pressure - Meter Run', Alarms: 200(L), 1200(H).
TT_201: Float, -40 to 200 degF, Label: 'Degrees Fahrenheit', Desc: 'Gas Temperature - AGA-3 Meter Run', Alarms: 10(L), 130(H).
DP_201: Float, 0-250 inH2O, Label: 'Inches Water Column', Desc: 'Differential Pressure - Orifice Plate', Alarms: 0(L), 200(H).
AT_201: Float, 0-100 ppm, Label: 'Parts per Million', Desc: 'Hydrogen Sulfide Concentration - Safety', Alarms: 0(L), 10(H).
FQ_201: Float, 0-999999 Mscf, Label: 'Thousand Standard Cubic Feet', Desc: 'Cumulative Gas Volume - Daily Total', Alarms: 0(L), 500000(H).
Save path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\oilgas_flow.c3
